hits.label: PL and RMCD optically detect a fragile nu=-1/3 FQAH state in twisted MoTe2.

provenance.method: Codex curation pass from arXiv abstract

hits.summary: The 2026 arXiv/PRL report says PL and RMCD identify ferromagnetic states at nu=-1, -2/3, and -1/3, with Curie temperatures about 11 K, 3.5 K, and 2.4 K; the nu=-1/3 state has a narrower electric-field range and lower temperature scale.

hits.label: semiconductor moire materials should be viewed as a unified field spanning excitons, Hubbard-model physics, magnetism, topology, and designer many-body states
hits.summary: semiconductor moire materials should be viewed as a unified field spanning excitons, Hubbard-model physics, magnetism, topology, and designer many-body states Use for: the best compact field review when orienting someone new to modern TMD moire physics

hits.label: optical probes can be primary evidence for correlated states
hits.summary: For Xu Lab-style moiré work, PL, RMCD, MOKE, and pump-probe measurements should be treated as potentially state-sensitive primary evidence, not merely support for transport.

hits.label: Spectral Evidence for Local-Moment Ferromagnetism in van der Waals Metals Fe3GaTe2 and Fe3GeTe2
hits.summary: Official Xu Group publication (2024). Topics: vdw_magnetism.

hits.label: moire potentials should be viewed as a programmable excitonic lattice, not only as a perturbation to a uniform exciton
hits.summary: moire potentials should be viewed as a programmable excitonic lattice, not only as a perturbation to a uniform exciton Use for: conceptual bridge from early interlayer-exciton work to modern moire-exciton and correlated-optics interpretation

hits.label: trion PL and RMCD can act as filling-sensitive optical probes of integer and fractional Chern states in twisted MoTe2
hits.summary: trion PL and RMCD can act as filling-sensitive optical probes of integer and fractional Chern states in twisted MoTe2 the paper highlights strong signatures near `nu = -1, -2/3, -3/5` Use for: the main optical bridge between PL/RMCD observables and correlated topological phases

hits.label: transport, trion PL, and RMCD together support zero-field FQAH states in twisted MoTe2
hits.summary: transport, trion PL, and RMCD together support zero-field FQAH states in twisted MoTe2 strong states near `nu = -1, -2/3, -3/5` Use for: optical plus magnetic sensing of topological states

hits.label: Local probe of bulk and edge states in a fractional Chern insulator
hits.summary: local probes can resolve both bulk and edge structure in a fractional Chern insulator rather than relying only on global transport Use for: local-versus-bulk evidence and any discussion of edge reconstruction or spatial inhomogeneity

hits.label: correlated interlayer exciton insulating behavior can emerge in a moire-coupled semiconductor heterostructure and be resolved optically
hits.summary: correlated interlayer exciton insulating behavior can emerge in a moire-coupled semiconductor heterostructure and be resolved optically Use for: foundational context for correlated excitonic phases as part of the same measurement ecosystem as moire electron phases

hits.label: local probes can resolve both bulk and edge structure in a fractional Chern insulator rather than relying only on global transport
hits.summary: local probes can resolve both bulk and edge structure in a fractional Chern insulator rather than relying only on global transport Use for: local-versus-bulk evidence and any discussion of edge reconstruction or spatial inhomogeneity
